checks.description: When freq is non-zero, wave_out must eventually toggle; the toggle must occur within a conservative observation window (no exact-cycle claim).
checks.pass_condition: At least one transition of wave_out is observed after the first rising edge of clk following a change of freq from 0 to a non-zero value, without requiring a fixed number of cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When freq changes from 0 to a non-zero value.

checks.description: Observe that wave_out toggles after a number of clk cycles that does not exceed a conservative bound (e.g., 2*freq) when freq is stable and non-zero.
checks.pass_condition: A change in wave_out is seen within a reasonable number of clk cycles after the design has been running with a constant non-zero freq; the exact cycle count is not mandated.
checks.trigger_condition: When a stable non-zero freq is applied.
